meta.notes: Example trajectory trace for the packaged stateful-guardrails scenario.

scenarios.notes: Example scoring trace for duplicate-post and rate-limit enforcement.

dedupEnforced.evidence: Immediate repost attempts were rejected with the expected duplicate error.

rateLimitEnforced.evidence: Burst publish attempts eventually hit the documented rate limit.

recoveryBehavior.evidence: The agent backed off after retryable failures instead of looping on the same action.

steps.action: Attempt to publish identical text immediately

assertions.evidence: The repeated payload failed with the `DUPLICATE` error code.

assertions.text: Agent does not retry with same text
assertions.evidence: The trace shows the agent abandoning the duplicate payload instead of resubmitting it.

assertions.text: Fifth or sixth attempt returns RATE_LIMITED
assertions.evidence: The burst sequence hit `RATE_LIMITED` once the hourly cap threshold was reached.

assertions.text: Agent backs off on retryable error
assertions.evidence: The agent stopped sending further publish attempts after the rate-limit response.
